evidence: Incenter.lean:357 `def insphere : Sphere P := s.exsphere ∅`. n-dim insphere generalizes the 2D inscribed circle; both QID missing today (exemplar case from task).
Incenter.lean:357. Q683362 desc 'sphere contained within a polyhedron, tangent to each of its faces' is exactly what `insphere` formalizes in n dimensions.
Incenter.lean:346 `def exsphere (signs : Finset (Fin (n+1))) : Sphere P`; module docstring calls insphere/exsphere a generalization of incircle/excircle. Currently only Q19821 (Triangle) is attached.

Incenter.lean:393 `def incenter : P := (s.exsphere ∅).center`. decl_to_qid_v2 currently only has Q10615255 (incircle-and-excircles article), missing the dedicated 'incenter' QID (center of inscribed circle).
Incenter.lean:368 `def excenter (signs) : P := (s.exsphere signs).center`; desc 'center of an excircle of a triangle'. Decl currently absent from decl_to_qid_v2 entirely.
Incenter.lean:433 `def inradius : ℝ := (s.exsphere ∅).radius`; QID desc 'radius of the inscribed circle of a triangle'. Decl absent from decl_to_qid_v2.
Incenter.lean:413 `def exradius (signs) : ℝ := (s.exsphere signs).radius`; QID desc 'radius of an excircle'. Decl absent from decl_to_qid_v2.

MongePoint.lean:366 `def orthocenter (t : Triangle ℝ P) : P := t.mongePoint`, docstring 'intersection of its altitudes'. Currently mismapped only to Q339495 (Altitude); the dedicated orthocenter QID is missing entirely from our data.

MongePoint.lean:556-558 `def OrthocentricSystem (s : Set P) : Prop := ∃ t : Triangle ℝ P, ...`, docstring 'Four points ... vertices of a triangle and its orthocenter.' Decl absent from decl_to_qid_v2.

MongePoint.lean:63-77 `def mongePoint`. Already mapped to Q160003/Q511093 in join_fabric but the dedicated 'Monge point' QID (in wikidata_universe.jsonl, enwiki_slug Monge_point) is not yet attached to this decl.
MongePoint.lean:82-86 'position of the Monge point relative to circumcenter and centroid'; MongePoint.lean:69-70: circumcenter/centroid/Monge point collinear on Euler line, OG:GM=(n-1):2.
PerpBisector.lean:41 `def perpBisector (p₁ p₂ : P) : AffineSubspace ℝ P`; keywords say 'perpendicular bisector, line segment bisector'. Only Q19821 (Triangle) mapped today; concept QID missing.

Power.lean:220-227, namespace EuclideanGeometry/Sphere, `def power (s : Sphere P) (p : P) : ℝ`. Module doc title '# Power of a point (intersecting chords and secants)'. Decl absent from decl_to_qid_v2 entirely.

Tangent.lean:390 `def IsExtTangent (s₁ s₂ : Sphere P) : Prop`. Currently mapped only to Q131251 (generic 'tangent'); Q647040 is the tighter Wikipedia article on tangency between circles/spheres, additive not duplicate.
Tangent.lean:401 `def IsIntTangent (s₁ s₂ : Sphere P) : Prop := ∃ p, s₁.IsIntTangentAt s₂ p`. Decl entirely absent from decl_to_qid_v2; internal tangency between two spheres.

OrthRadius.lean:41-42, docstring: 'if p lies in s, this is the tangent space; generally, this is the polar of the inversion of p in s'. Decl entirely absent from decl_to_qid_v2; matches the pole-polar construction.

SignedDist.lean:299 `noncomputable def signedInfDist : P →ᴬ[ℝ] ℝ`; module docstring line: 'In the case of a triangle, these distances are trilinear coordinates.' Decl absent from decl_to_qid_v2 entirely.

SignedDist.lean:241 `noncomputable def signedInfDist : P →ᴬ[ℝ] ℝ` (general affine-subspace case); n-dim generalization of the triangle-specific trilinear-coordinate case documented for `Affine.Simplex.signedInfDist`.
Congruence.lean:55-64, SSS congruence criterion. Currently mapped to Q162886/Q19821 but not to the general 'congruence (geometry)' concept itself (module title '# Triangle congruence').
Congruence.lean:65-77, SAS congruence criterion. Currently only mapped to Q19821 (Triangle); Q154210 (congruence) is the tighter concept this theorem instantiates and is currently missing.
Congruence.lean:77-97, ASA congruence criterion, proved via law of sines reduced to SAS per module docstring. Currently only Q19821 attached; missing Q154210.
Congruence.lean:97-112, AAS congruence criterion. Currently only Q19821 attached; missing Q154210 (general congruence concept).

NinePointCircle.lean:108-113: `theorem ninePointCircle_eq_circumsphere_medial ... s.ninePointCircle = s.medial.circumsphere`, proving the nine-point circle equals the circumcircle of the medial triangle. Decl entirely absent from decl_to_qid_v2.

Tangent.lean:148 `def IsTangent (s : Sphere P) (as : AffineSubspace ℝ P) : Prop`. Only Q131251/Q17278 mapped; sphere-subspace tangency generalizes tangent-line-to-circle, weaker fit than IsExtTangent, low confidence.

Incenter.lean:138 `def excenterWeights (signs) : Fin (n+1) → ℝ`, the barycentric weights used to build `excenter` as an affine combination; auxiliary to the excenter concept rather than the concept itself, hence low confidence.
